name: Earth Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cup boiling water or apple juice
1/2 to 1 cup chopped nuts (can be a mixture of nuts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease a bundt pan well.
3. Let the oatmeal sit in water (or apple juice) for a few minutes.
4. Cream the butter and sugars together until smooth.
5. Blend in the eggs, one at a time, mixing after each addition.
6. Stir in the flavorings (baking soda, nutmeg, cinnamon, ginger, cloves, vanilla, rum, brandy).
7. In a separate bowl, mix together the flour, salt, and spices.
8. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring until smooth.
9. Gently fold in the oats, seeds (sesame and poppy), raisins, and nuts.
10. Pour the batter into the prepared bundt pan.
11. Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
12. Allow the cake to cool for 10 minutes before turning it onto a plate.
